comment: Videos that batch operations (claude_coach --all, backfill_shots_json, batch grade overlay renders, index rebuilds that trigger re-processing, etc.) MUST skip. These videos stay in the gallery with whatever content they already have on R2 — we just don't reprocess them.
reason: Files (preprocessed/poses/detections) no longer reside on any GPU machine and the user has decided they are not worth the cost of syncing + reprocessing.
